title: Red Spider Text
description: Turns spiders into floating red text!
body:
Red Spider Text is a resource pack aimed for players with Arachnophobia. It changes the models of Spiders and Cave Spiders into red floating text, inspired by Lethal Company's _Arachnophobia Mode_ and the ERROR text for missing Source Engine models. I was gonna call it "Arachnophobia Mode" but that was already taken.

![A spider and a cave spider in a forest with the resource pack enabled. Both are floating texts.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7513f06ea319e2e077e50b7bae209b0e08a011b.png)

### This resource pack requires either Entity Model/Texture Features, OptiFine, or a mod that supports Custom Entity Models.

This resource pack has only been tested with a handful of Minecraft versions using Entity Model Features. It *should* theoretically work with any other version with proper CEM support.
